name: Barvarian Veal with Asparagus
recipeIngredient: 20 ounces Frozen asparagus (or 2 pounds Fresh Asparagus)
recipeInstructions:
Frozen Asparagus: Tips and pieces. (2 boxes (10 oz each))
Fresh Asparagus: Cleaned and cut into 1-inch pieces.
1. Brown the veal in hot oil in a Dutch oven.
2. Add onion and carrots. Cook until onion is transparent.
3. Stir in parsley.
4. Mix lemon juice, beef broth, flour, and seasonings until well-blended.
5. Pour over meat. Cover and bake at 325°F for 1.5 hours or until meat is tender.
6. Add more broth if needed.
7. Cook asparagus until tender-crisp.
8. Stir into veal and serve immediately.
